a1.verb_hint: Use a piece of with advice, information, evidence, or furniture.
Use a piece of instead of a regular plural for this uncountable noun.
Use a cup of for drinks served in a cup.
Use a glass of for liquids in a glass.
Use a bottle of for liquids in a bottle.
Use a slice of for thin pieces of food.
Use a loaf of with bread.
Use a bowl of for food served in a bowl.
Use a container noun plus of.
Make the partitive noun plural, not the uncountable noun.
Pluralize the partitive unit.
